title: GitHub Review by greptile-apps[bot]
summary:
The reviewer identifies three bugs related to Kubernetes API timing windows that pass in tests (fake client) but fail in production:

1. **`WaitForExternalSecret`** should handle not-found errors gracefully (return `false, nil`) like `IsSecretReady` does, instead of wrapping and bubbling them up as real errors that cause exponential backoff.
2. **`GetTLSSecret`** should validate that `tls.crt` and `tls.key` keys actually exist in the Secret's data, since cert-manager populates them asynchronously after the Secret is created.
3. **Job replacement** should treat `AlreadyExists` on `Create` as a transient/retry condition, because `Delete` doesn't remove the old Job immediately when finalizers are present.

code_comments.author: greptile-apps[bot]
code_comments.resolution: Fixed: WaitForExternalSecret now checks apierrors.IsNotFound(err) after c.Get and returns (false, nil) instead of propagating the wrapped error. This matches the IsSecretReady pattern. Added TestWaitForExternalSecret_notFound test verifying the not-found case returns no error.

code_comments.author: greptile-apps[bot]
code_comments.resolution: Fixed: GetTLSSecret now validates that both "tls.crt" and "tls.key" exist in secret.Data after retrieving the Secret, returning a descriptive error ("TLS Secret %s is missing key %q") if either is absent. Added TestGetTLSSecret_missingTLSKeys test verifying an error is returned when the Secret exists but lacks TLS keys.

code_comments.author: greptile-apps[bot]
code_comments.resolution: Fixed: RunJob now checks apierrors.IsAlreadyExists(err) after the replacement c.Create call and returns (false, nil) to allow the next reconcile to retry once the old Job's finalizer is cleared. Added TestRunJob_existingComplete_specChanged_alreadyExists test using a fake client interceptor that forces AlreadyExists on Job Create, verifying the function returns (false, nil) without error.

resolution_summary: All three review comments were addressed with the exact suggested fixes, plus corresponding test cases were added for each. WaitForExternalSecret now handles NotFound as a normal not-ready state, GetTLSSecret validates that tls.crt and tls.key are present before returning, and RunJob treats AlreadyExists on replacement Create as a transient condition. Each fix also added a dedicated test: TestWaitForExternalSecret_notFound (secrets_test.go), TestGetTLSSecret_missingTLSKeys (tls_test.go), and TestRunJob_existingComplete_specChanged_alreadyExists (job_test.go).
